name: saas-landing
description: A complete SaaS landing page composed entirely from ibirdui blocks: a sticky Navbar, a Hero, a Features grid, Testimonials, a Pricing toggle, an FAQ, a CTA band and a Footer. One command installs the page plus every block and primitive it composes. A single h1 (the hero) leads a clean heading outline, and the banner/contentinfo landmarks bracket the page.

notes: Exactly one h1 (the hero); every other section is an h2, so the page has a clean, single-rooted heading outline
The Navbar renders the banner landmark and the Footer the contentinfo landmark, with the sections in between wrapped in main
Each composed block keeps its own tested a11y — labelled navs, the FAQ accordion pattern, figure/blockquote testimonials, and reduced-motion support throughout
The brand mark is decorative (aria-hidden) and inks with foreground + primary tokens, so it re-themes in light and dark

intents: a complete SaaS / product landing page
a full marketing page assembled from ibirdui blocks
a ready-to-customise landing template built on ibirdui
